verdict.answer_first: B: opens with the answer, "The fastest path is `docker system prune`" and immediately gives "docker system prune -a --volumes"; A starts with a menu, "from safest to most aggressive."
verdict.decisiveness: B: gives one clear recommendation, "run `docker system df` first... then prune the specific category"; A mostly surveys levels and ends with a workflow.
verdict.actionability: B: easier to act on because it gives the one-shot command first, then safer separate commands and checks; A is solid but more spread out.
